violations.text: Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information.(Last date of sold ) were lacking.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Molluscan Shellfish (seafood case ) located in (seafood dept ) did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -poufer unit -cabinets in seafood dept -deli cooler -utility shelf in deli dept -seafood 1 dr Freezer -cheese and seafood grab n go cooler Non food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The following physical facilities is in poor repair.: 1.ceiling in back food storage and seafood storage area observed with damaged tiles. 2.walls in the back storage area has holes. 3.Dairy walk in freezer observed with damaged door skirts. 4.Door in produce dept has area of exposed wood. 5.wall in produce storage area observed with hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Cheese observed with date marking exceeding the 7 days after date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation.PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

Consumer advisory is lacking in seafood dept. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelves in the deli and seafood department have an accumulation of food residue and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The following physical facilities is in poor repair.: 1.ceiling in back food storage area observed with damaged tiles. 2.walls in the back storage area has holes. 3.seafood walk in freezer observed with damaged door skirts. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The following physical facilities observed with debris: 1.floors and floor drains in produce cooler, deli department, and seafood department. 2.walls and ceiling in the meat walk in cooler. 3.fans in milk walk in cooler. has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The back outside(along building)has an accumulation of trash ,litter, and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves (dried beans display) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2023
The panels to the loading dock door is in poor repair. Exposed insulation observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023

The floors in the produce area and beneath cheese display refrigerator has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
